name: Shortcut Modification for Persistence
description: Detects modification of LNK files in startup or common locations for persistence
query:
// Detect LNK file creation in startup directories
// Trigger on shortcut files in startup or desktop paths
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)(Startup|Start Menu).*\.lnk$"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 120 seconds
